description: Log in as admin (admin / Admin1234!) and create a Database activity in the "Introduction to Biology" (BIO101) course named "Medication Reference Database" with the description "A collaborative reference of medications encountered during clinical rotations". Configure the database with four fields: "Drug Name" (Text input), "Drug Class" (Menu with options: Analgesic, Antibiotic, Antihypertensive, Anticoagulant, Other), "Indications" (Text area), and "Common Side Effects" (Text area). Add a sample entry for "Amoxicillin" (Drug Class: Antibiotic) with indications "Bacterial infections including ear infections, pneumonia, and urinary tract infections" and common side effects "Nausea, diarrhea, skin rash".
